prompt: Preciso de fotos de happy hour pro By Rock, preferencialmente bebidas e ambiente. Quero umas 5 opcoes boas pra montar os stories da semana.

assertions.name: setup-project-loaded
assertions.description: Called list-projects and identified By Rock project

assertions.name: knowledge-base-loaded
assertions.description: Called get-knowledge to load project context (especially CARDAPIO)

assertions.name: catalog-searched-with-filters
assertions.description: Called search-catalog with relevant filters (theme=happy-hour or menuCategory=BEBIDAS/AMBIENTE)

assertions.name: thumbnails-shown-base64
assertions.description: Called get-image-thumbnail with asBase64=true for at least 3 images

assertions.name: recommendations-justified
assertions.description: Final output contains justification for each recommended image (not just a list)
